entity.summary: Decentralized exchange and automated-market-maker platform on the Elastos Smart Chain, providing token swaps, liquidity pools, farming, staking, and bridge-related functions.
entity.notes: Current official application domain remains available and first-party documentation identifies Glide Finance as a DEX/AMM on the Elastos Smart Chain with swap, liquidity, farming, staking, and bridge functions. Documentation pages are older, so confidence is kept at medium pending fresher lifecycle evidence.

evidence.title: Glide Finance Introduction
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Glide Finance as a decentralized exchange and automated market maker on the Elastos Smart Chain and documents trading, liquidity, farming, staking, and bridge functions.

evidence.title: Glide Finance Swap documentation
evidence.notes: First-party swap documentation describes the Uniswap V2-based AMM, token swaps through liquidity pools, trading fees, and on-chain swap execution.

evidence.title: Glide Finance DEX discovery entries
evidence.notes: Secondary DEX registry corroborates Glide Finance identity; duplicate source rows are consolidated into one entity.
